stemHtml: What is correct about crossing the intertropical convergence zone (ITCZ) in the high level cruise?

options.a: Wind shear and icing associated with ITCZ thunderstorms give an increased risk of buffet or stall.
options.b: There is no risk of buffet or stall if the aircraft remains outside the cloud.
options.c: The aircraft should fly as close as possible to the Aerodynamic Ceiling.
options.d: Modern jet transports can cruise above the thunderstorm hazards.
